summary: Foundation models for agentic coding and long-horizon work Discussion | Link
content: Poolside is a foundation model company bringing intelligence to everywhere work gets done. Their mission is to drive abundance for humanity by creating artificial general intelligence.
chineseSummary: 代理编码和长期工作的基础模型关联
chineseContent: Poolside 是一家基础模型公司，将智能带入任何完成工作的地方。他们的使命是通过创造通用人工智能来为人类带来丰富。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
